text.title: Cold Outreach Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Sender domain warm AND list ≤200 with personalisation data?

branch.when: domain_warm == true AND list_size <= 200 AND personalisation_field_present == true
